name: The Archivist
viewpoint: Institutions bury continuity; archives restore it.

name: The Security Professional
viewpoint: Alignment and secrecy are framed as maturity.

name: The Editor
viewpoint: Publishable language is often narrower than truth.

name: The Diplomat
viewpoint: Moral language often softens strategic obedience.

name: The Witness
viewpoint: Policy has a body count and a geography.
